The '''Destructive Electromagnetic Pulse 2 ion carbine''', or '''DEMP 2''', fired high power ion bursts capable of disabling electrical systems and stunning organic targets. It had a range of three to 120 [[Meter/Legends|meters]].

The DEMP 2 had two modes of fire, a regular fire that consumed a few charges per shot, and an advanced fire that shot a higher-powered bolt that exploded on impact, spreading the ion damage around it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''
